name: Peach Pudding
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Jam (peach or other pure fruit)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat 2 cups juice with peaches, gingerroot, and agar. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently, then cover and let simmer until the peaches are plump, about 5 to 7 minutes.
2. Remove and discard the gingerroot.
3. Place half of the mixture into a blender, not filling the container more than halfway. Cover with a cloth over the lid to protect your hand from hot liquid. Blend thoroughly and pour into a bowl.
4. Blend the remaining mixture.
5. In a separate container, dissolve arrowroot in the remaining 1 cup of juice.
6. Return the puree to the saucepan and bring to a slow boil. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Pour the arrowroot-juice mixture into the puree. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture turns clear. Cook for an additional 30 seconds.
8. Remove from heat and pour into a 2-quart shallow pan or individual parfait glasses. Allow to cool to room temperature for one hour or set in freezer for 15 to 20 minutes.
9. Top with jam and garnish with toasted coconut. Serve.
